critiques.finding: updateConversationCoachingMode and touchConversationAfterMessage only persist via profiles.onboarding_data; when chatconversation table is present, coaching_mode and modified_date/preview side-effects do not round-trip on table rows.
critiques.alternative: Mirror the try-table-then-fallback pattern used by createConversation: attempt chatconversation column/RPC update first, fall back to onboarding_data for prototype schema gaps.
evidence: supabase — no chatconversation migration in prototype

critiques.finding: useChatSignOutClear clears the ?conversation= URL param only; it does not reset composer local state or invalidate cached sidebar list — acceptable for SPA but narrower than Bubble bTIma store-reset semantics if in-memory chat state grows.
critiques.alternative: On sign-out, also bump sidebar listVersion or reset chat module context if additional client caches are introduced.
